summary: Comprehensive post-refactor regression testing of Quasar Apps website. Backend pytest suite (10/10 passed): root, case-studies list, case-study by slug, 404 handling, contact submission (with persistence verify), contact validation (invalid email, missing fields), no MongoDB ObjectId leakage, and legacy status endpoints. Frontend Playwright validation passed for all critical flows: Hero section with both CTAs, 6 service cards, myCSA case study display, View Case Study navigation to /case-study/mycsa-app with full details (challenge/solution/results/technologies), About section stats (1 Live Product, 2 Co-Founders, UX Led Approach, 100% Committed), GitHub Callout link to github.com/QuasarApps, exactly 2 founder cards (Martin Osorio, Christiana Bowen) with 2 LinkedIn links, Testimonials carousel next/prev navigation switching between founder quotes, contact form submission showing success toast. Previous iteration_4 testimonial carousel issue is RESOLVED.

issues: 3 images (logo) lack loading='lazy' attribute. Acceptable for above-the-fold logo but does not fully satisfy the 'all images lazy loaded' requirement. LOW priority.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns Quasar Apps message (200)
Backend: GET /api/case-studies returns list containing mycsa-app (200)
Backend: GET /api/case-studies/mycsa-app returns full case study without _id (200)
Backend: POST /api/contact with valid data saves to MongoDB and is retrievable via GET /api/contact
Backend: POST /api/contact without company succeeds and stores company=null
Backend: POST /api/contact with invalid email returns 422
Backend: POST /api/contact missing required fields returns 422
Backend: GET /api/contact returns list with no leaked Mongo _id
Backend: POST/GET /api/status creates and retrieves status check
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero title 'We craft digital experiences that transcend' and both CTAs visible
Frontend: Services section displays 6 service cards (data-testid='service-{0..5}')
Frontend: Case Studies section shows myCSA.app with 'View Case Study' and 'Visit mycsa.app' buttons
Frontend: Clicking View Case Study navigates to /case-study/mycsa-app and displays challenge/solution/results/technologies
Frontend: About section stats correct (1 Live Product, 2 Co-Founders, UX Led Approach, 100% Committed)
Frontend: GitHub Callout links to https://github.com/QuasarApps
Frontend: Team shows exactly 2 founders (Martin Osorio, Christiana Bowen) with 2 LinkedIn links
Frontend: Testimonials next/prev buttons cycle between Martin's and Christiana's quotes (BUG FROM ITERATION 4 IS FIXED)
Frontend: Contact form submits successfully and shows toast 'Message sent successfully! We'll be in touch soon.'
action_items: (Optional / LOW) Add loading='lazy' to remaining 3 logo/icon images for full compliance with lazy loading requirement, though current behavior is acceptable for above-the-fold logos.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean (~236 lines), uses Pydantic models, async motor, proper status codes, HTML-escapes contact form input before sending via Resend, runs sync Resend SDK via asyncio.to_thread to avoid blocking the event loop - GOOD
Mongo _id is properly excluded via {'_id': 0} projections - GOOD
Pydantic EmailStr validation works (returns 422 on bad email) - GOOD
Case studies are seeded in-memory in CASE_STUDIES list (not DB-backed). Fine for current scope of 1 study but flag for future scalability.
Contact email failure is logged and swallowed so the API still returns success once persisted - good UX, but consider returning a flag indicating email delivery status in the response payload.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Contact form messages prefixed with 'TEST_' were created during test runs (visible via GET /api/contact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at backend/tests/test_quasar_api.py covers all endpoints. Frontend data-testids: services use 'service-{idx}', stats use 'stat-{idx}', contact uses 'contact-name-input', 'contact-email-input', 'contact-company-input', 'contact-message-input', 'contact-submit-button' (note: not -btn). Testimonials use 'testimonial-prev-btn', 'testimonial-next-btn', 'testimonial-quote'. Previous iteration_4 testimonial bug is fixed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration. Iteration 4 testimonial nav bug is now resolved by current AnimatePresence + key={current} implementation in Testimonials.js (verified: q1=Martin -> next -> q2=Christiana -> prev -> q1=Martin).
